examples: One such project — Objectify-Appengine — is the subject of this month's column.
I'm done updating my domain objects, at least in terms of what I can do with Objectify.
Objectify also permits relationships and exposes a query interface that supports the GAE notions of filtering and sorting.
The only influence we have over advertising is to have them changed or removed when we object to them, either because they objectify men or women, or contravene our rules on intrusiveness.
